title: Expense Reimbursement Process and Submission Deadlines
text:
Q: What is the process for submitting expense reimbursements and what are the deadlines?
A: To submit an expense reimbursement, employees must complete the Expense Reimbursement Form available on the company intranet. All receipts must be attached, and the form should be submitted to your direct supervisor for approval. Once approved, the form should be forwarded to the Finance Department. The submission deadline for expense reimbursements is the last day of the month following the month in which the expenses were incurred. For example, expenses from January must be submitted by February 28. Reimbursements will typically be processed within two pay cycles after submission. If you have any questions or need assistance, please contact the Finance Department at finance@company.com.
